summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FairCheck AI second iteration. Successfully tested both new features: Export functionality (PDF/CSV) at bottom of analysis page and Creators/Innovators section on homepage. All backend APIs functional including new export endpoints. Frontend UI fully functional with all new features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) - 200 OK
Sample dataset endpoint (/api/sample-dataset) - 20 records with proper columns
Sample dataset analysis (/api/analyze-sample) - fairness score 65.0
CSV upload and analysis - fairness score calculation working
Invalid CSV upload error handling - proper 400 response
NEW: PDF export endpoint (/api/export-pdf) - generates valid PDF files (3096 bytes)
NEW: CSV export endpoint (/api/export-csv) - generates valid CSV content (704 bytes)
Homepage loading with correct hero section
Hero section 'Get Started' and 'Try Demo' buttons functional
NEW: 'Meet the Innovators' section positioned between Features and About sections
NEW: Gowtham K profile - Co-founder & Data Science Architect, Nagarjuna College of Engineering, Data Science & AI
NEW: Srushti B.S profile - Co-founder & Creative Strategist, Nagarjuna College of Engineering, Cyber Security
Try Demo button navigation and auto-analysis trigger
Dashboard fairness score, gender chart, income chart, bias alerts display
AI-generated insights section with proper styling
NEW: Export Report section at BOTTOM of analysis page (after Insights)
NEW: Export as PDF button functional - triggers file download
NEW: Export as CSV button functional - triggers file download
Smooth animations and transitions throughout application
About AI Bias section present on homepage
Footer section with hackathon branding
Navigation flows: Get Started → Analysis → New Analysis → Back to Home
Glassmorphism design with correct color scheme (#00F5FF primary, #7B61FF secondary)
Responsive layout and professional hackathon prototype appearance

success_percentage.backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed including new export endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI flows, new features, and integrations working)
